title: 品葱上这些左逼啥时候知行合一的移民朝鲜？
meta_description: 品葱上这些左逼啥时候知行合一的移民朝鲜？ - North Korea claims that the US soldier who crossed over into their country, Travis King, was unhappy with racial discrimination ...
meta_keywords: 品葱,左逼,知行,合一,移民,朝鲜
contents:
North Korea claims that the US soldier who crossed over into their country, Travis King, was unhappy with racial discrimination in the Army and America's 'unequal society'.
朝鲜声称，越境进入朝鲜的美国士兵特拉维斯·金对军队中的种族歧视和美国的“不平等社会”感到不满。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/1691574374619574747/photo/1
